fields.name: Leftovers
fields.description: Restores 1/16 of max HP at the start of each round.

fields.name: Black Sludge
fields.description: 50% chance to restore 1/8 of max HP each round.

fields.name: Mystic Water
fields.description: Slowly recovers a tiny fraction of HP each round.

fields.name: Rocky Helmet
fields.description: Reflects 1/6 of damage taken back to the attacker.

fields.name: Flame Shard
fields.description: 30% chance to reflect 25% of damage taken back.

fields.name: Salac Seed
fields.description: 35% chance to heal 12.5% of max HP when hit. Up to 3 times.

fields.name: Sitrus Berry
fields.description: Once per battle, 25% chance to heal 25% of max HP when hit.

fields.name: Focus Sash
fields.description: Once per battle, survive a knockout with minimal HP.

fields.name: Focus Band
fields.description: 10% chance to survive any knockout with 10% HP.

fields.name: Rage Crystal
fields.description: On fainting, reflects 30% of damage taken back to attacker.

fields.name: Lum Berry
fields.description: Once per battle, immediately cleanses all status conditions.

fields.name: Pecha Berry
fields.description: 75% chance to cleanse status. Up to 2 times per battle.

fields.name: Cure Orb
fields.description: Once per battle, 50% chance to cleanse status and heal 12.5% HP.

fields.name: Rage Chip
fields.description: 50% chance to heal 1/16 HP when inflicted with a status.
